Note: The TP63 (NM_003722) - LEPREL1 (NM_018192) rearrangement is an inversion that results in an in frame fusion of TP63 exons 1-3 with LEPREL1 exons 2-15. The functional significance is undetermined.
Note: The TSC2 Rearrangement results in the intragenic deletion of exon 17-29. One of the breakpoints is within exon29. Its functional significance is undetermined.

Note: The TSPAN9 - TEK rearrangement is a translocation that results in a fusion of TSPAN9 exons 1 - 2 to TEK exons 11 - 23. The fusion includes the kinase domain of TEK. Functional significance is undetermined.
Note: TUBGCP3 (NM_006322) - BRCA2 (NM_000059) rearrangement is an inversion that results in the fusion of TUBGCP3 exons 1-14 with BRCA2 exons 10-27. The functional significance is undetermined.
Note: The UPK3A - EP300 rearrangement is a duplication that results in a fusion of UPK3A exons 1 - 2 to EP300 exon 31. Functional significance is undetermined.
Note: The CAPN11 - VEGFA Rearrangement results in the fusion of CAPN11 exons 1-14 with VEGFA exons6-8. The breakpoint in CAPN11 is within exon 14 . Its functional significance is undetermined.
Note: The XPO1 rearrangement is a translocation with a breakpoint in exon 25. Functional significance is undetermined.
Note: The FUBP1 - ZZZ3 rearrangement is a deletion that results in the fusion of FUBP1 exons 1-3 with ZZZ3 exons 2-15. The functional significance is undetermined.
